notes: The response competently summarises the migration context and surfaces useful questions, but fails to produce a structured discovery artefact: no MVP bounding with explicit deferrals, no out-of-scope section, no measurable success indicators, no genuine assumption register with risk-if-wrong statements, and personas are referenced only generically (RBNZ relationship team, engineers) without role/timing/cost specificity — critically missing the BS11 notification status and PPSR legal opinion as explicit uncertainties.
